block_reason: ATS dedup: on clicking Continue, SaaSHR returned 'You already applied for this job on Jun 14, 2026.' Keyed on jamiecheng0103@gmail.com.
ats_dedup_message: You already applied for this job on Jun 14, 2026.
gmail_corroboration: No 4G Clinical confirmation email in Jamie's inbox (SaaSHR direct-portal submits often send none). The 4G Clinical L&D role still appeared in her LinkedIn SAVED jobs as of Jun 19, but the ATS itself — the authoritative record — reports a Jun 14 submit under her email.

form_values_filled_before_block.first_name: Jamie Yi-Chieh (parens stripped by field sanitizer; entered 'Jamie (Yi-Chieh)')

auditor: AUDIT_VERDICT.json = PASS (all checks A-F), written this session
decision: STOP per dedup rule (feedback_dedup_via_ats_my_applications.md). Did NOT duplicate. No second submission created.
ats_mechanics_learned: SaaSHR careers portal (secure6 redirects to secureN load-balancer). Public job list is JS-rendered (server shell ~4KB). Job titles are <a href=#> JS clicks. 'Apply' button opens an inline modal with first_name/last_name/email/phone, a required Resume file input (#_file_input_0), and 'Add additional documents' -> Supporting Documents sub-modal (file input #_file_input_1, Display Name text + Document Type <select fileDocumentType_N>: ''/CV/Flag Photo/Open Visibility/Resume). set_input_files works on both file inputs. The first_name field strips parentheses. Dedup is enforced server-side at the Continue step, keyed on email, surfaced as a toast + OK dialog: 'You already applied for this job on <date>.' No login/account or captcha encountered up to that point.
